description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, set the DOCKER_DRIVER variable to overlay, and run a global before_script `source ci/prepare` for all jobs. Define three stages: test, build, and deploy. In the test stage add an rspec job that uses the ruby:alpine image, has no services, caches the vendor/ruby directory with key $CI_BUILD_STAGE, and executes `bundle install --path vendor` followed by `bundle exec rspec`. In the build stage add a build job that runs `docker info` and `docker_build_push $CI_BUILD_SHA`. In the deploy stage add a production job that runs only on the master branch, targets the production environment, and runs `docker_tag_push $CI_BUILD_SHA production` then `docker_cloud service redeploy --sync production.deployment-demo`, and a staging job that runs on all branches except master, targets the staging environment, and runs `docker_tag_push $CI_BUILD_SHA staging` then `docker_cloud service redeploy --sync staging.deployment-demo`.
